item.title: Could The Menendez Brothers Go Free?
item.description: This episode revisits the infamous Menendez brothers case, exploring their convictions for the 1989 murders of their parents and examining legal developments that raise questions about their potential release.

media:content.media:title: Could The Menendez Brothers Go Free?
media:content.media:description: This episode revisits the infamous Menendez brothers case, exploring their convictions for the 1989 murders of their parents and examining legal developments that raise questions about their potential release.

item.title: The Mystery Of The Fallen Boy
item.description: This episode explores the unexplained death of Fallen Boy, examining the investigation, possible theories, and the questions that continue to surround the case.

media:content.media:title: The Mystery Of The Fallen Boy
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the unexplained death of Fallen Boy, examining the investigation, possible theories, and the questions that continue to surround the case.

item.title: Sabotage: Who Was Out To Get This Lucky Parachuter?
item.description: This episode examines the attempted murder of Victoria Cilliers, who survived a sabotaged skydive, and the investigation that exposed a calculated plot behind the incident.

media:content.media:title: Sabotage: Who Was Out To Get This Lucky Parachuter?
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the attempted murder of Victoria Cilliers, who survived a sabotaged skydive, and the investigation that exposed a calculated plot behind the incident.

item.title: The McStay Family Mystery: Solved
item.description: This episode examines the disappearance and murders of the McStay family, and how investigators eventually uncovered the truth behind the case years later.

media:content.media:title: The McStay Family Mystery: Solved
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the disappearance and murders of the McStay family, and how investigators eventually uncovered the truth behind the case years later.

item.title: The Murderer of the Starved Rock Case Released After 60 Years
item.description: This episode reexamines the Starved Rock Murders, exploring the conviction of Chester Weger and the ongoing debate over whether the case was truly solved.

media:content.media:title: The Murderer of the Starved Rock Case Released After 60 Years
media:content.media:description: This episode reexamines the Starved Rock Murders, exploring the conviction of Chester Weger and the ongoing debate over whether the case was truly solved.

item.title: The Woman Whose Body Gave Off Nerve Gas
item.description: This episode explores the mysterious case of Gloria Ramirez, whose death in 1994 led to unusual reactions among hospital staff and ongoing debate about what really happened.

media:content.media:title: The Woman Whose Body Gave Off Nerve Gas
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the mysterious case of Gloria Ramirez, whose death in 1994 led to unusual reactions among hospital staff and ongoing debate about what really happened.

item.title: They Were Called Runaways Until Their Bikes Were Found
item.description: This episode examines the disappearance of Patrick Warren and David Spencer, a case that became widely known in the UK and remains unresolved decades later.

media:content.media:title: They Were Called Runaways Until Their Bikes Were Found
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the disappearance of Patrick Warren and David Spencer, a case that became widely known in the UK and remains unresolved decades later.
